_comment: MeshCentral config — uploaded to /mnt/tank/system/apps-config/meshcentral/data/config.json. Behind the NAS mgmt-plane Traefik at https://mc.w1.lv/. MeshCentral serves plain HTTP on :80; Traefik terminates TLS with the wildcard *.w1.lv cert. `TlsOffload: true` = any proxy, `RedirPort: 0` = disable MC's internal HTTP->HTTPS redirect (Traefik does that). `Cert` is the SNI name Traefik routes on.
